title: Agri-environment scheme business and uptake data March 2025
body: "This publication gives statistics on the number of agreements that were live as of 1st March 2025. The data does not include any agreements that went live after 1st March 2025 or any new Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI) agreements that will go live in 2025.   This publication also give statistics on the number of businesses with an agri-environment scheme agreement. The agri-environment schemes included are Countryside Stewardship, Environmental Stewardship and Sustainable Farming Incentive. "
